title: Capacitor
description: Capacitor documents overview material for Capacitor in the hardware domain. It is classified as a concept page for the electronics class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights 커패시터, ESR, ESL, 세라믹 커패시터, and 탈탄 커패시터, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include hardware, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is hardware / capacitor / overview, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
